name: ancestry
description: Family tree builder and visualizer (NestJS + React).

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm --prefix server run start:dev" "npm --prefix web run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix server run build && npm --prefix web run build
scripts.test: npm --prefix server test && npm --prefix web test -- --run
scripts.lint: npm --prefix server run lint && npm --prefix web run lint
